Contact your senators and ask them to close this loophole and protect our communities! #cryptocorruption

Justice for #JuanDiegoMaciasLopez! Thank you @profe.baquera for bringing light to this! #enid #oklahoma #latinotiktok #mexicantiktok

Texas has a new DMV rule that demands proof of legal status for vehicle titles and first-time registration. This is not public safety. No data shows undocumented immigrants cause more accidents than U.S. citizens. They are just playing with people’s livelihoods. #texas #dmv #undocumeted #immigrants #latino
Last night was historic! We will flip Texas blue! Mark my words!!💙#ginahinojosa #jamestalarico #jasminecrockett #latino #primary
We are complicit in what is happening in Mexico too. Our hands are not clean. Remember that! #mexico #unitedstates #history #latino #latina

The United States has lax g*n laws and so many firearms, that this helps arm organized crime groups. Americans suffer from these laws too. They help make m@ss sh00tings happen. #history #latino #mexico #breakingnews #mexican

Before Renee Good and Alex Pretti, there was the case of Ruben Ray Martinez, a 23-year-old U.S. citizen, who had his life taken by an ICE against in South Padre Island, Texas. Martinez’s mother described him in a social media post as “not violent.” He was celebrating spring break and his birthday. #taylorswift #badbunny #harrystyles #breakingnews #news

ICE agents took the life of 23-year-old Ruben Ray Martinez in South Padre Island, Texas last year. For nearly a year, it was concealed. According to Martinez’s mother, anyone who knew her son, “knows he was NOT a violent person, never a threat to anyone.” This was during spring break. In a social media posts, she asked, “How is a car a threat at zero mph?” #rubenraymartinez #latino #reneegood #alexpretti #breakingnews

DHS and ICE kept blocking detainees in Minneapolis from talking to their lawyers. The Democracy forward team sued and won! A federal judge ordered DHS and ICE to immediately restore meaningful access to attorneys. Democracy Forward is doing good work! @Democracy Forward  #democracyforwardpartner
